title: ayenia incallida
intro: Ayenia incallida is a plant species that belongs to the Malpighiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Ayenia incallida include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Ayenia incallida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
